title: Ampersand
pitch: Two heroes fused by a living tether: stretch it into a cutting beam, then snap them together to crush whatever is caught between.
howto: Drag one hero while the other anchors - the taut tether cuts, and sweeping it hits harder. Release to snap the pair together for a crushing shockwave; overstretching frays the bond. Earn sparks for tether upgrades and bond XP (sync kills pay extra) for milestone perks.
controls: Drag a hero to stretch and sweep the beam. Release to snap. Drag open ground to move the pair. WASD also moves.
